query:
SELECT p.batchNo, p.productName, p.importedBrandName, p.importedCategoryName, p.categoryId AS productCategoryId, se.id AS stationEventId, se.stationCode, se.categoryId AS eventCategoryId, se.subtypeCode, se.countForProductivity, psd.id AS kpiDetailId
FROM products p
JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.eventType = 'complete' AND se.stationCode = 'A1'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.batchNo;

FROM products p
JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.eventType = 'complete' AND se.stationCode = 'A1'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.batchNo;
